# GitHub Labels for Rooms

To maintain the project's aesthetic, please use the following pastel color palette for GitHub labels.

| Label Name | Color (Hex) | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Label Name | Color (Hex) | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bug` | `e8c4c0` | Something isn't working as expected. |
| `enhancement` | `bbd4e8` | New feature or improvement. |
| `documentation` | `cfc8dc` | Improvements or additions to documentation. |
| `session-logic` | `c4d8c0` | Changes related to turn orchestration or agent selection. |
| `cli` | `f2e8cf` | Improvements to the interactive wizard or terminal output. |
| `security` | `e8c4c0` | Security-related fixes or enhancements. |
| `testing` | `bbd4e8` | New tests or improvements to the testing suite. |
| `help-wanted` | `f0f0f0` | Extra attention is needed on this issue. |
| `good-first-issue` | `c4d8c0` | Good for newcomers. |
| `duplicate` | `f0f0f0` | This issue or pull request already exists. |
| `invalid` | `f0f0f0` | This doesn't seem right. |
| `question` | `cfc8dc` | Further information is requested. |
| `wontfix` | `f0f0f0` | This will not be worked on. |
| `priority:high` | `e8c4c0` | High priority item. |
| `priority:medium` | `bbd4e8` | Medium priority item. |
| `priority:low` | `c4d8c0` | Low priority item. |
